query: SELECT sp.competenciaName, sp.progressoTotal, sp.aulasDisponiveis, sp.aulasConcluidas, sp.mediaAvaliacoesRespondidas, sp.externalCompetenciaId FROM student_performance sp WHERE sp.userName LIKE '%Wandemberg%' ORDER BY sp.competenciaName LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT sp.competenciaName, sp.progressoTotal, sp.aulasDisponiveis, sp.aulasConcluidas, sp.mediaAvaliacoesRespondidas, sp.externalCompetenciaId FROM student_performance sp WHERE sp.userName LIKE '%Wandemberg%' ORDER BY sp.competenciaName LIMIT 20;
